activities_projects.title: Conduction Demonstration
steps: Light a candle and heat one end of the metal rod
Place small wax drops on the rod
Observe melting of wax and note time taken

activities_projects.title: Convection in Water
steps: Fill a beaker with water and heat it gently
Add a drop of food color at the bottom
Observe movement of color in water

activities_projects.title: Radiation from Sun
steps: Place thermometer on black paper under sunlight
Place another thermometer on white paper under sunlight
Compare temperature readings after 5 minutes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands radiation and effect of color

activities_projects.title: Insulator vs Conductor
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate between heat insulators and conductors
steps: Place both spoons in hot water
Touch handles carefully and note temperature change
Identify conductor and insulator
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes materials as conductors or insulators

activities_projects.title: Temperature Change Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe heat transfer in everyday objects
steps: Measure temperature of both cups initially
Place thermometer in hot water and record temperature every 1 minute
Place thermometer in cold water and record temperature

activities_projects.title: Conduction in Solids
activities_projects.objective: Observe effect of different materials on heat transfer
steps: Heat one end of each rod over a candle
Place wax drops on other end
Compare which wax melts first

activities_projects.title: Effect of Surface Color on Heat Absorption
activities_projects.objective: Learn how color affects radiation absorption
steps: Pour equal hot water into both cups
Measure temperature after 5 minutes
Compare heat retention in both cups
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of color on heat absorption

activities_projects.title: Air Convection Experiment
steps: Place incense stick at the bottom of a jar
Heat jar gently from one side
Observe smoke movement indicating air convection

activities_projects.title: Design a Simple Thermos
activities_projects.objective: Apply insulation concept in real life
steps: Wrap cup with foil and cotton
Pour hot water and measure temperature after 10 minutes
Compare with unwrapped cup
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands insulation to reduce heat loss

activities_projects.title: Create a Heat Transfer Quiz
steps: Prepare five questions on conduction
Prepare five questions on convection and radiation
Exchange with a friend and solve
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and answers (10 marks)
